positive: A symmetrical and highly detailed illustration of 'Celestial Bloom' – a mythical, bioluminescent flower cluster suspended in deep space. The design must feature glowing, intricate filigree petals with metallic gold accents and veins of shimmering nebula dust. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets Japanese Woodblock Print (Ukiyo-e) with a vector illustration finish. Composition: Perfectly centered, framed for maximum impact on apparel. Color Palette: Deep indigo and cosmic violet background, contrasted sharply by glowing cyan, teal, and rich gold/yellow bioluminescence. Lighting: Dramatic rim lighting emphasizing the floral contours and depth, ensuring crisp silhouettes suitable for screen printing. Aspect: Square format, highly detailed focal point.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermarks, logos, trademarks, grainy, noise, ugly, lowres, bad anatomy, multiple flowers, busy background, sketchy, photorealistic, hyperdetailed, asymmetrical
